title: Live coverage: SpaceX to launch final ViaSat-3 satellite on Falcon Heavy rocket
summary: This will be the 12th launch of a Falcon Heavy rocket to date and the first use of Landing Zone 2 and Landing Zone 40 simultaneously. Liftoff from Launch Complex 39A at NASA’s Kennedy Space Center is scheduled for 10:21 a.m. EDT (1421 UTC), the opening of an 85-minute window.

title: Coronavirus adds to ViaSat-3 delay, first launch still in 2021
